zh.Thaxted, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德
zh.of Thaxted, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward於1530年出生在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德。他於大約1555年與Joan Archer在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1588年6月10日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國艾可塔可泰德。

zh-hans.of Thaxted, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward于1530年出生在英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德。他于大约1555年与Joan Archer在英国英格兰艾可塔可泰德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1588年6月10日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国艾可塔可泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Saward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward was born in 1530, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He married Joan Archer about 1555, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 June 1588, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Thaxted, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward est né en 1530, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Joan Archer environ 1555, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1588, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward wurde 1530 in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1555 in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom Joan Archer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juni 1588 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thaxted, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward è nato il nel 1530 nel Thaxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Joan Archer circa 1555, nel Thaxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 giugno 1588, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Thaxted, Essex, England.

ja.Thaxted, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスサクステド

ja., Thaxted, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスサクステド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sawardは1530年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドで生まれた。約1555年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドでJoan Archerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1588年6月10日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサクステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward(은)는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 Joan Archer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1588년 6월 10일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 스액테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward nasceu em 1530, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Joan Archer aproximadamente 1555, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1588, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward родился в 1530 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Archer около 1555 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 июня 1588 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Saward nació en 1530, en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Joan Archer aproximadamente 1555, en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de junio de 1588, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra.
